localized_texts.text: Farm In The City

An Eden of Nature and Animals Farm In The City (FITC) is a unique new concept that combines elements of wildlife and nature set in a designed environment of a conservation park. Drawing upon the values of Malaysia’s multi-racial and multi-cultural population, FITC is designed to resemble a typical Malaysia village or “kampung” setting. FITC plans to become a focal point for tourism in the state by providing educational and entertaining insight into the lifestyle and setting of a Malaysian village, farm and fruit orchard with its natural plants and wildlife. FITC is much more than a viewing exhibit. It encourages visitor-interactions with the animals and plant-life in a comfortable yet authentic environment. FITC also places great importance on education of visitors on the various aspects of farm and animal life as well as wildlife conservation and preservation.
Feed and interact with Giant Tortoise Species
Chance to interact with more than 100 species of tame and exotic animals
Featuring more than 300 individual birds for all around the world
Be amazed with more than 100 Malaysian birds in free-flight
Summon thousands of Koi fish by ringing a bell

Get up close with friendly goats and sheep, watch playful chickens peck around their coop, and learn about the importance of sustainable urban agriculture.  Farm in the City offers interactive workshops and educational talks, allowing you to participate in planting activities, understand the farm-to-table concept, and gain a deeper appreciation for local food production.Beyond the animals and workshops, Farm in the City provides a peaceful escape from the city's hustle and bustle.  Wander through scenic gardens, relax amidst greenery, and enjoy the fresh air.  The farm also boasts a charming on-site cafe where you can savor delicious meals prepared using fresh, locally sourced ingredients, often grown right there on the farm.  Farm in the City provides a unique opportunity to reconnect with nature, learn about sustainable practices, and create lasting memories in an unexpected urban oasis.
Restriction: Children denote from 90 cm body height and until 11 years old.
Accessibility: Free child entry (below 90 cm) must be accompanied by a paying adult.
Restriction: Outside food and drinks are strictly not allowed.
Restriction: Smoking is prohibited inside the Farm due to fire hazards and the potential harm it can cause to animals and other visitors.
What’s included: Single entry to Farm In The City
How to use: Show Mobile Ticket: Ticketing counter
How to use: Present your voucher and exchange it for a physical ticket
How to use: For foreigners, please present a proof of identity at the time of redemption of child and senior tickets
How to use: For local Malaysians, please present your MyKad at the time of redemption

Terms & Conditions: Admission Tickets are valid on the selected fixed date. Tickets can be used from 10:00 AM onwards on the selected date. Each purchase is valid for one entry only. Tickets are not valid for use on the same day as purchase. Tickets are for personal use only. Cancellation policy: No cancellations, refunds, or changes are allowed. Expired tickets will not be extended, replaced, or refunded. Not valid with other ongoing discounts, promotions, or packages.Eligibility Child: Above 90 cm in height and 11 years old and below (proof of age required). Senior Citizen: 60 years old and above, eligible to enjoy Child rate (proof of age required). Free Admission: Children below 90 cm in height. Children must be accompanied by an adult at all times within the farm.Attraction Access IMPORTANT: Guests must present the Globaltix Sdn Bhd E-Voucher at the Farm In The City ticketing counter for wristband / sticker ticket redemption. All vouchers must be redeemed from Globaltix Sdn Bhd at least 3 working days before the visit date. Only vouchers issued by Globaltix Sdn Bhd will be accepted at the counter. Visitor name on the E-voucher must match the visitor’s identification. Incorrect names may result in invalid E-vouchers.Additional Information Free & Easy tour basis. Outside food is strictly not allowed. It is a condition of entry that visitors agree to comply with all rules and regulations displayed at Farm In The City. All tickets sold shall only be valid for a period of THIRTY (30) DAYS from the date of purchase.Important Notes The owner and management of Farm In The City shall not be held liable for any injuries, death, loss, or property damage. No refunds will be provided due to bad weather, natural disasters, or force majeure. Farm In The City management reserves the right to change Terms & Conditions without prior notice. No cancellations or amendments are allowed after the E-Voucher has been issued. Failure to comply with the terms may result in delay or non-issuance of the E-Voucher.
Cancellation Policy: No cancellation for this activity as per vendor policy
